title: Entry Identity, Idempotent Upserts, Version History, and Tombstones
description: Repeated polls duplicate entries, corrected content overwrites evidence, GUID collisions merge sources, missing items disappear immediately, and retries repeat notifications. Learners cumulatively produce versioned idempotent entry repository through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Scope external IDs to feed and format semantics, detect collisions, and preserve the raw identity basis and parser version.
Return explicit inserted, unchanged, revised, conflicting, quarantined, or rejected results from atomic constraints and comparison.
Store bounded meaningful revisions with field diff, fetch identity, timestamps, and correction or moderation cause.
